parameters.query:
SELECT di.*, s.name as shop_name, s.timezone
FROM dms_integrations di
JOIN shops s ON s.id = di.shop_id
WHERE di.shop_id = '{{ $json.body.shop_id }}'
  AND di.enabled = true
LIMIT 1;

INSERT INTO dms_sync_log (
  shop_id, integration_id, entity_type, entity_id, external_id,
  direction, status, request_payload, response_payload, error_message
) VALUES (
  '{{ $json.shop_id }}',
  '{{ $json.integration_id }}',
  '{{ $json.action.replace('sync_', '') }}',
  {{ $json.entity_id ? "'" + $json.entity_id + "'" : 'NULL' }},
  {{ $json.external_id ? "'" + $json.external_id + "'" : 'NULL' }},
  'outbound',
  '{{ $json.status }}',
  '{{ JSON.stringify($('Build DMS API Request').first().json.body || {}) }}',
  '{{ JSON.stringify($json) }}',
  {{ $json.error_message ? "'" + $json.error_message.replace(/'/g, "''") + "'" : 'NULL' }}
);

UPDATE dms_integrations SET
  last_sync_at = now(),
  last_sync_error = {{ $json.status === 'failed' ? "'" + ($json.error_message || 'Unknown error').replace(/'/g, "''") + "'" : 'NULL' }},
  updated_at = now()
WHERE id = '{{ $json.integration_id }}';

parameters.responseBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ status: $json.status || 'logged', action: $('Build DMS API Request').first().json.action, provider: $('Build DMS API Request').first().json.provider, external_id: $json.external_id || '' }) }}

parameters.content:
## DMS Sync Handler
Receives sync requests from post-call processor.
Routes to Tekmetric / Mitchell 1 / Shop-Ware APIs.
Logs all sync attempts to dms_sync_log.

body.issue_summary: Check engine light on, rough idle
